verifier.py is missing, and export_result.sh only checks if size > 200 bytes

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openvsp_env openvsp_high_lift_deployment task by confirming that the task operates on the real NASA eCRM-001 conceptual aircraft model, while the high-lift configuration schedule is synthetically generated via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected output paths (/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/transport_takeoff.vsp3 and /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/takeoff_mesh.stl) and the target deflections (flapinboard 20.0, flapoutboard 15.0, slat -25.0, elevator -8.0) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and takeoff_schedule.txt. Discovered a critical defect: verifier.py is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable because the success specification (verifier.py::verify_high_lift_deployment) points to a non-existent script.
